title: ajuga relicta
intro: Ajuga relicta, also known as Bugleweed or Ajuga, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its alkaloids content, particularly ajugan and ajucapine. In traditional herbal preparations, Ajuga relicta is often used as a tea or tincture to treat various health issues, including insomnia and digestive problems.
